name_en: Gold-Painted Stone Slab Stupa
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a stone slab stupa decorated with gold paint. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1984-09-01. Held by Dairyūji Temple (Yokura).

name_en: Kiuchi Kagura Dance
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the kagura (sacred dance) of Kiuchi. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1985-02-27. Maintained by the Kiuchi Kagura Preservation Society at Kiuchi Daijin Shrine (Kiuchi).

name_en: Aburada Kagura Dance
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the kagura (sacred dance) of Aburada. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1985-02-27. Maintained by the Aburada Kagura Preservation Society at Ōmiya Daijin Shrine (Aburada).

name_en: Shin'ichiba Kagura Dance
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the kagura (sacred dance) of Shin'ichiba. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1985-06-01. Maintained by the Shin'ichiba Tengū Shrine Kagura Preservation Society and the Shin'ichiba district (Shin'ichiba).

name_romaji: Mokuzō Shō Kanzeon Bosatsu Ryūzō, Mokuzō Aizen Myōō Zazō
name_en: Wooden Standing Statue of Shō Kannon Bosatsu and Wooden Seated Statue of Aizen Myōō
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, comprising a wooden standing statue of Shō Kannon Bosatsu and a wooden seated statue of Aizen Myōō. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1991-03-01. Held by Kanpukuji Temple (Makino).

name_en: Documents of Kanpukuji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, documents of Kanpukuji Temple. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1991-03-01. Held by Kanpukuji Temple (Makino).

name_en: Gilt-Bronze Keman Ornament with Peony Arabesque Design
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a gilt-bronze keman (Buddhist altar ornament) with a peony arabesque design. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1991-03-01. Held by Kanpukuji Temple (Makino).

name_en: Iwagasaki Grove
description_en: A monument designated as a natural monument, the grove of Iwagasaki. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1991-03-01. Located at Inari Shrine, Iwagasaki (Sawara-ho).

name_en: Stone Slab Monument with Amida Characters and Images
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a stone slab monument (itabi) bearing Amida characters and images. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1991-03-01. Held by the Aradera district (Aradera).

name_en: Stone Slab Monument with Amida Characters and Images
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a stone slab monument (itabi) bearing Amida characters and images. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1991-03-01. Held by the Ōto district (Ōto).

name_en: Stone Slab Monument with Amida Characters and Images
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a stone slab monument (itabi) bearing Amida characters and images. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1991-03-01. Held by Jōdoji Temple (Ōtogawa).

name_en: Stone Slab Monument with Seed Syllable and Image of Fudō Myōō
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a stone slab monument (itabi) bearing a seed syllable and image of Fudō Myōō. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1991-03-01. Held by Saifukuji Temple (Yamanobe).

name_en: Stone Slab Monument with Amida Characters and Images
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a stone slab monument (itabi) bearing Amida characters and images. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1991-03-01. Held by Dairyūji Temple (Yokura).

name_en: Stone Slab Monument with Amida Characters and Images
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a stone slab monument (itabi) bearing Amida characters and images. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1991-03-01. Located at the Tada branch hall Tsukasadō (Katori).

name_en: One Thousand Buddha Images
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, a group of one thousand Buddha images (sentaibutsu). It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1991-03-01. Held by Senbutsuji Temple (Tsunomiya).

name_en: Stone Slab Monument with Seed Syllable (Inscribed First Year of Shōgen)
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a stone slab monument (itabi) with a seed syllable, inscribed with the first year of the Shōgen era. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1992-10-01. Held by Mitsuzōin Temple (Iwagasakidai).

name_en: Wooden Standing Statue of Shō Kannon Bosatsu
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a wooden standing statue of Shō Kannon Bosatsu. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1992-10-01. Held by the Kannon district (Kannon).

name_en: Mandalas of the Two Realms
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the paintings category, mandalas of the Two Realms. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1992-10-01. Held by Kanpukuji Temple (Makino).

name_en: Mandala of the Constant Radiance Assembly
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the paintings category, a mandala of the Constant Radiance assembly. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1992-10-01. Held by Kanpukuji Temple (Makino).

name_en: Painting of the Shaka Triad with the Sixteen Guardian Deities
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the paintings category, a painting of the Shaka triad with the sixteen guardian deities. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1992-10-01. Held by Kanpukuji Temple (Makino).

name_en: Miroku Mandala
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the paintings category, a mandala of Miroku. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1992-10-01. Held by Kanpukuji Temple (Makino).

name_en: Sacred Storehouse
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the buildings category, a sacred storehouse (shinko). It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1994-03-01. Located at Katori Jingū Shrine (Katori).

name_en: Main Sanctuary of Kaerida Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the buildings category, the main sanctuary (honden) of Kaerida Shrine. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1994-03-01. Located at Kaerida Shrine (Kaerida).

name_en: Wooden Seated Statue of the Eleven-Headed Kannon Bosatsu
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a wooden seated statue of the eleven-headed Kannon Bosatsu. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1996-07-01. Held by Kangiin Temple (Ōgishima).

name_en: Training Hall of the Tenshin Shōden Katori Shintō-ryū
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the buildings category, the training hall (dōjō) of the Tenshin Shōden Katori Shintō-ryū. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1996-07-01. Located at the Shintō-ryū dōjō (Katori).

name_en: Kagura Dance of the Motoyahagi District
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the kagura (sacred dance) of the Motoyahagi district. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1996-07-01. Maintained by the Kagura Preservation Society and the Motoyahagi district (Motoyahagi).

name_en: Kagura Dance of Atago Shrine
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the kagura (sacred dance) of Atago Shrine. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1998-10-21. Maintained by the Atago Shrine Kagura Chigomai Preservation Society at Atago Shrine (Fuma).

name_en: Twelve-Performance Kagura of the Shirakawa School at Yamakura Daijin Shrine
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the twelve-performance kagura of the Shirakawa school at Yamakura Daijin Shrine. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1998-10-21. Maintained by the Yamakura Performing Arts Preservation Society at Yamakura Daijin Shrine (Yamakura).

name_en: Land Survey Register of Arakita Village
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the old documents category, a land survey register (mizuchō) of Arakita village. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1999-10-21. Held by the Arakita district (Arakita).

name_en: Painting of the Buddha's Nirvana at Daijōji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the paintings category, a painting of the Buddha's nirvana held by Daijōji Temple. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1999-10-21. Held by Daijōji Temple (Iwabe).

name_en: Painting of the Buddha's Nirvana at Ankōji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the paintings category, a painting of the Buddha's nirvana held by Ankōji Temple. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 1999-10-21. Held by Ankōji Temple (Iwabe).

name_romaji: Kumano Jinja narabini Wakamiya Hachimangū tō Shinkōsai Miyamae Bansho Shisha Uke Shoyaku Geinō
name_en: Ceremonial Performances for Receiving Envoys at the Miyamae Guard Post during the Shinkō Festivals of Kumano Shrine and Wakamiya Hachimangū
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, ceremonial performances for receiving envoys at the Miyamae guard post during the shinkō festivals of Kumano Shrine and Wakamiya Hachimangū. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 2000-05-19. Maintained by the parishioners of Wakamiya Hachimangū and the Shidaka district (Shidaka).

name_en: Roof-Tile End Mold
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a mold for roof-tile ends (gatōhan). It was municipally designated by Katori City on 2001-12-18. Kept at the Katori City Cultural Property Preservation Hall (Hanegawa).

name_en: Shimoono Kagura Dance
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the kagura (sacred dance) of Shimoono. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 2002-01-04. Maintained by the Shimoono district (Shimoono).

name_romaji: Shimonakachō-ku Dashi Ningyō Sugawara no Michizane
name_en: Festival Float Figure of Sugawara no Michizane of the Shimonakachō District
description_en: A tangible folk cultural property, the festival float (dashi) figure of Sugawara no Michizane belonging to the Shimonakachō district. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 2002-04-01. Held by the Shimonakachō district (Sawara-i).

name_en: Standing Statue of Myōken Bosatsu
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a standing statue of Myōken Bosatsu. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 2003-03-03. Held by Honmyōji Temple (Ōsaki).

name_en: Seated Statue of a Male Deity
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a seated statue of a male deity. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 2003-03-03. Held by Honmyōji Temple (Ōsaki).

name_en: Documents of the Yoda Family, Lords of Fuma
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the old documents category, documents of the Yoda family, lords of Fuma. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 2003-12-03. Privately held (Shidaka).

name_en: Land Survey Register of Shidaka Village from the Second Year of Enkyō
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the old documents category, a land survey register (mizuchō) of Shidaka village from the second year of the Enkyō era. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 2003-12-03. Privately held (Shidaka).

name_en: Documents of the Shindō Family, Lords of Fuma
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the old documents category, documents of the Shindō family, lords of Fuma. It was municipally designated by Katori City on 2003-12-03. Privately held (Shidaka).
